text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fuuujiii! ☆ Can we hold a big<n>futomaki party
at the dorms?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you never run out of fantastic<n>ideas. Sure, I
will allow it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In fact, while we're at it, why not make it<n>a lavish
banquet and invite everyone<n>from the dorms?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'd love that! ♪ I'll make sure to prepare<n>lots of
other yummy foods too, then!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And I shall provide entertainment with<n>my magic.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Really? What kind of magic tricks?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I could make the face of the<n>futomaki
roll look different with every<n>slice...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Or I could turn a regular-sized futomaki<n>into a
giant one with the snap of a<n>finger... What do you
think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Can you really do that?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, I can with your help. Let's work<n>together
to surprise everyone.
